omia 0.2.0
  • Reference

    • Advanced count time-series uncertainty and forecast evaluation

Package index

Data preparation

prep_incidence_data()
Prepare incidence data

Estimation and simulation

estimate_rt_epiestim()
Estimate time-varying reproduction number with EpiEstim
renewal_expected_incidence()
Compute expected incidence under a renewal equation
simulate_poisson_process()
Simulate incidence from a Poisson process
fit_poisson_growth()
Fit a log-linear Poisson growth model
forecast_poisson_growth()
Forecast incidence from a Poisson growth model with uncertainty
evaluate_rolling_origin_forecast()
Evaluate forecasts with rolling-origin backtesting
simulate_epichains_paths()
Simulate uncertainty-aware transmission chains with epichains
simulate_renewal_forecast()
Simulate renewal-based count forecasts with uncertainty propagation
simulate_epichains_forecast()
Simulate chain-based incidence forecasts with epichains
summarise_forecast_uncertainty()
Summarise predictive uncertainty from forecast draws
score_forecast_draws()
Score probabilistic count forecasts
rolling_origin_evaluate()
Rolling-origin backtesting for count forecasts
compare_incidence_models()
Compare incidence model fits

Visualization

plot_epicurve()
Plot an epidemic curve
plot_rt_estimates()
Plot time-varying reproduction number estimates

Reporting

outbreak_consensus_summary()
Create outbreak consensus summary

Data

cat_ba_week1
Cat BA week 1 incidence dataset
